name: L-Carnitine
summary: Decision-ready summary: L-Carnitine is best framed for fatigue context; sperm motility research context; recovery support; safety screen: seizure disorder; warfarin; trimethylamine odor sensitivity.
description: L-Carnitine supports fatigue; sperm parameters; exercise recovery with moderate confidence in this merged decision layer.
safetyNotes: Review seizure history and warfarin; GI upset/fishy odor can occur.

sources.title: PubMed PMID 15607555. Minimal citation row added from existing workbook PMID; title/year/journal still require PubMed metadata extraction.

sources.note: evidence citation lookup; PMID source present in Evidence_Register

contraindications: hypothyroidism on levothyroxine due to reduced cellular thyroid-hormone uptake
warfarin or other anticoagulant medications due to potentiated bleeding risk
fishy body odor and dose-dependent GI upset are common
long-term high-dose use raises TMAO a gut-microbiome metabolite linked to cardiovascular risk in observational research.
